# glitchtip_project (Resource)

Manages a GlitchTip project. A project is created under a team but lives at organization scope. The `team` attribute is used only at creation time to place the project; the API does not return it, so it is carried through from state and is null after import.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "glitchtip_organization" "example" {
  name = "Acme Inc"
}

resource "glitchtip_team" "example" {
  organization = glitchtip_organization.example.slug
  slug         = "backend"
}

resource "glitchtip_project" "example" {
  organization = glitchtip_organization.example.slug
  team         = glitchtip_team.example.slug
  name         = "api"
  platform     = "python"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the project.
- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization that owns the project. Changing this forces a new project to be created.
- `team` (String) Slug of the team under which the project is created. Used only at creation time; the API does not return it, so it is null after import. Changing this forces a new project to be created.

### Optional

- `event_throttle_rate` (Number) Probability (in percent) of events that are throttled at the project level. Defaults to 0.
- `platform` (String) Platform identifier for the project (for example `python` or `node`). The server may normalize or assign this value, so it is also Computed.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug identifying the project within its organization. If omitted, GlitchTip derives it from `name`.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the project was created.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the project.
- `scrub_ip_addresses` (Boolean) Whether GlitchTip scrubs IP addresses from events for this project.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Projects are imported as "<organization-slug>/<project-slug>".
# The "team" attribute is only used at creation and is not recoverable on import;
# add it back to your configuration after importing.
terraform import glitchtip_project.example acme-inc/api
```
